pi_items.verified_value: GSI, SANI, BKB (TOLI and KWP are missing from dataset)
pi_items.source: Inspection of /workspace/data/fdsn/ shows only GSI, SANI, and BKB miniSEED waveform files exist.

privileged_info_summary: The task definition (task.json) was structurally truncated on disk, omitting explicit metadata fields, but implicit claims from the task description were audited. The event is verified to be real data from the 2024 Noto Peninsula earthquake based on USGS QuakeML records. However, the task description explicitly requires configuring station bindings and parsing picks for five stations (TOLI, GSI, KWP, SANI, BKB), but empirical inspection of the GEOFON miniSEED data shows that waveforms for TOLI and KWP are entirely missing from the environment dataset, making it impossible to generate picks for those two stations.
